summary: Classified seven open PRs from the hydrated preflight artifact. No close/comment/label mutations are planned: the open PRs are not high-confidence duplicates of #88713, several have distinct scopes or unresolved review/check blockers, and the job does not allow merge or fix PR actions. #88713 remains the representative canonical PR for this cluster only. Validator security findings for #88875 and #89157 are repaired by routing those exact PR refs to central security handling without using a cluster-scoped security action.
